name: components/breadcrumbs
description: A navigation aid that reveals the user's current location within a hierarchical page structure, typically displayed as a horizontal trail of links separated by chevrons or slashes. Built with native anchor elements and separator slots, supporting responsive truncation and themeable text colors for active vs inactive states.
useCases: E-commerce category hierarchies such as Home > Electronics > Laptops > MacBook Pro
Documentation sites showing the nested topic path for quick upward navigation
Admin dashboards with deep resource routing (Projects > Alpha > Tasks > #1024)
Content-management systems where editors jump between folder levels
usage: import { Breadcrumbs, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/breadcrumbs"
